## What changed

- Short bullets are fine.

## How I checked it

- Commands you ran
- Manual checks, packet captures, or screenshots if relevant

## Notes / Risk

- Compatibility notes, privileged runtime requirements, or known limitations

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `make fmt`
- [ ] I ran `make test`
- [ ] I ran `go vet ./...`
- [ ] I ran `make verify` or explained why it was not needed
- [ ] I updated docs/examples for user-visible changes
